1._value: I met this girl named #p403# in #m10003000#. She was devastated about losing the lucky coin that she borrowed from a friend, and she asked me to find it for her. She also told me that a bunch of guys draped in white cloth took it from her in the subway, and that I might find them at the #bConstruction Site B1#k, deep in the station... I should go there first...

2._value: I found the lost coin that #p403# of #m10003000# was looking for, and returned it to her. A precious coin borrowed from her friend, huh... as a reward, she gave me a bunch of return scrolls... not bad at all!! She also said other items can be found at #bConstruction Site B1#k... I should check it out later...

0._value: Hey, um... have you seen a coin around here? Oh my gosh, I'm in deep trouble... I was going to pay my friend back with that coin so I put it in my pocket... I guess the coin fell out of it and fell deep into the subway. It's a special coin, so my friend's going to be really mad about it. Well, can I ask you a favor? Can you find it for me?

Thanks! Good thing I asked. Phew... I saw a couple of guys draped in white cloth picking that coin up when I dropped it in the subway and running away with it... I tried to chase them down but the entrance was blocked so I couldn't go much further...

1._value: The entrance must be somewhere in the subway... probably at the #bConstruction Site B1#k. Anyway good luck with that... Everyone else has turned down the favor because it was too dangerous for them to actually do. You look strong, so I'm pretty confident that you'll find it for me.

0._value: You must be busy here and there, huh? But if you ever decide to change your mind, then please help me. I'm being serious here...

Yeah, this is it! There are lots of different coins, but this one's special, because it was made the same year my friend was born. In short, they were created the same year... what? You want to know where the year is written? You must have bad eyes, because if you look close enough, you'll be able to see it.

1._value: Besides, I borrowed this coin for a sec because apparently it brings good luck. Anyway thanks a lot. I can now return it to my friend, all thanks to you... and here, as a small sign of appreciation, this is for you. I collected these from different towns I've visited over time.

0._value: As a sign of appreciation, I bumped up your fame status and experience level a little. And, although too precious to give away, here they are, a whole bunch of the return scrolls to help you get back to town. I'll talk to you later then. Take care.

Still haven't found the coin that I lost? I'm screwed without it... go to the #bConstruction Site B1 of the #m10003000# subway#k and maybe you'll find it... There's a lot of weird equipment there so be careful. I believe in you!
